PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')

      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')

        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')

    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionMultiplicativeImpl(EXPRESSION_MULTIPLICATIVE)
      PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
        PsiElement(()('(')
        PsiPuppetExpressionAdditiveImpl(EXPRESSION_ADDITIVE)
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(+)('+')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
        PsiElement())(')')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(/)('/')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
